case_title: EVELYN D. LIM VS. RICHARD D. CREESE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,000.00 FILED BY LIM, EVELYN D. AS TO DEFENDANT CREESE, RICHARD D. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-10-2008 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED SERVED MAY-20-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CREESE, RICHARD D.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LIM, EVELYN D. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CREESE, RICHARD D. $405.27 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $465.27, THE COURT ADOPTS DEFENDANT'S PREVIOUSLY SUGGESTED RESOLUTION OF PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT CREESE, RICHARD D.
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-10-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-10-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT.ALL PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT RETAINED. (506).
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF LIM, EVELYN D. ADDITIONAL DEFENDANT EXHIBITS
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-10-2008 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED OCT-01-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
